'''Glamaxon Tvurl''', known as the '''Blade of Barab''' was a [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] gladiator in the [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. After winning a match, his half-severed arm was accidentally ripped off by the [[Unidentified Circus Horrificus ringmaster|Twi'lek host]], and he was killed moments later when a pack of smuggled [[Akk dog/Legends|akk dogs]] were unleashed upon him.

{{Char-stub}}
